subcodes.first_line: O maidservant of God! Give thanks unto God that thou hast become numbered among them that believe in God and are assured of His signs, and hast drunk from the chalice [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله شکر کن خدا را که منتسب بمومن بالله و موقن بایات الله شدی و جام
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @knowledge; recognition of God
